title: Shopify App Design Guidelines
summary: Shopify's official app design guidelines covering predictability, host-surface consistency, adaptive/mobile behavior, accessibility, and merchant trust for apps embedded in the Shopify admin. Provides a first-party Markdown representation.
lessons: Define an embedded/hosted product profile: inherit host navigation and behavior, minimize novelty in cross-surface workflows.
Require mobile-first testing for embedded apps and define boundary between product brand and host conventions.
caveats: Guidelines are scoped to Shopify's admin surface and merchant workflows; generalize host-integration principles without importing Shopify-specific patterns.
licenseNote: Public developer documentation; cite and synthesize. Documentation reuse terms were not verified for redistribution.
antiImitationNote: Transfer host-integration and embedded-app quality principles; do not copy Shopify admin patterns or merchant-specific workflows as universal defaults.
